title: Reports
text: Welcome to your reports site.

title: Reports
text:
Reports

Customer Rate Limit Report – Analysis of customer rate limiting patterns and trends
Datadog 4XX Error Analysis – 4XX error patterns by subdomain identifying problematic integrations and workflows

title: Customer Rate Limit Report
text:
summary = FileAttachment("data/agg_summary.csv").csv({typed: true})
detailRaw = FileAttachment("data/agg_detail.csv").csv()
detail = detailRaw.map(d => ({
  ...d,
  tickets_update_limit: +d.tickets_update_limit,
  tickets_update_used: +d.tickets_update_used,
  errors_429_count: +d.errors_429_count
}))

title: Customer Rate Limit Report
text:
Executive Summary
Customers with ticket update limits below 5,000 who are actively hitting rate limits (HTTP 429 errors). Filtered to accounts created before July 2019 with more than 300 ticket updates used.

totalAccounts = detail.length
total429Errors = d3.sum(detail, d => d.errors_429_count)
avgTicketsUsed = Math.round(d3.mean(detail, d => d.tickets_update_used))

md`
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Accounts affected** | ${totalAccounts.toLocaleString()} |
| **Total 429 errors** | ${total429Errors.toLocaleString()} |
| **Avg tickets used** | ${avgTicketsUsed.toLocaleString()} |`





























Download data: Summary (CSV) | Detail (CSV)

title: Customer Rate Limit Report
Customer Rate Limit Report
Customer Rate Limit Report
Customer Rate Limit Report
text:
Methodology

Data Sources







Source
Description




FACT_CAPACITY_AGGREGATED_API_USAGE_DATA_DAILY_SNAPSHOT
Daily API usage with rate limit and 429 error counts


BASE_INSTANCE_ACCOUNTS
Account metadata (name, creation date)





Filters

Accounts created before 2019-07-01
Ticket update limit < 5,000
Ticket updates used > 300
At least 1 HTTP 429 error
One row per account (highest 429 error count)

title: Customer Rate Limit Report
Customer Rate Limit Report
Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
text:
summary = FileAttachment("data/agg_summary.csv").csv({typed: true})
urls = FileAttachment("data/agg_urls.csv").csv({typed: true})
methods = FileAttachment("data/agg_methods.csv").csv({typed: true})

title: Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
text:
Executive Summary
Analysis of 4XX HTTP errors across customer subdomains to identify broken integrations, permission failures, and rate-limiting hotspots.

totalErrors = d3.sum(summary, d => d.count)
subdomains = [...new Set(summary.map(d => d.subdomain))]

md`
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Total 4XX errors (2 days)** | ${totalErrors.toLocaleString()} |
| **Subdomains analyzed** | ${subdomains.join(", ")} |`






















Download data: Summary (CSV) | URLs (CSV) | Methods (CSV)

title: Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
Datadog 4XX Error Analysis
text:
Methodology

Data Sources







Source
Description




Datadog Logs
pup logs aggregate — 4XX error counts by status code, URL, and HTTP method per subdomain





Limitations

Data covers a 2-day rolling window; long-term trends require repeated collection
URL grouping is limited to top 50 endpoints per subdomain per query
Log message details require individual log searches (not captured in aggregations)

title: Rate Limit Override Audit
text:
summaryData = FileAttachment("data/agg_concern_summary.csv").csv({typed: true})
highData = FileAttachment("data/high_concern.csv").csv({typed: true})
mediumData = FileAttachment("data/medium_concern.csv").csv({typed: true})
allData = FileAttachment("data/agg_all_classified.csv").csv({typed: true})
sandboxData = FileAttachment("data/sandbox_elevated.csv").csv({typed: true})

title: Rate Limit Override Audit
text:
Executive Summary
Accounts with rate limits elevated above their plan entitlement defaults.

highCount = highData.length
mediumCount = mediumData.length
totalElevated = allData.length

md`
| Concern Level | Count | Description |
|:---|---:|:---|
| **HIGH** | ${highCount} | Above HVAPI standard (>2500 global, >300 threshold, >30 per-ticket/bulk/incremental) |
| **MEDIUM** | ${mediumCount} | At HVAPI level (2500 or 300) without HVAPI addon |
| **Normal** | ${totalElevated - highCount - mediumCount} | Elevated but within plan entitlement |
| **Total Elevated** | ${totalElevated} | All accounts above base defaults |`





























Downloads: HIGH concern | MEDIUM concern | Sandboxes | All classified | Summary

title: Rate Limit Override Audit
Rate Limit Override Audit
text:
HIGH Concern Accounts
Accounts with rate limits above HVAPI standard (>2500 global API, >300 ticket threshold, >30 per-ticket/bulk/incremental). These are custom overrides that exceed what any standard plan provides.

viewof highFilter = Inputs.select(
  ["All", ...new Set(highData.map(d => d.plan_tier))],
  {label: "Filter by plan tier:", value: "All"}
)

filteredHigh = highFilter === "All" ? highData : highData.filter(d => d.plan_tier === highFilter)

Inputs.table(filteredHigh, {
  columns: [
    "INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_SUBDOMAIN",
    "INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_POD_ID",
    "plan_tier",
    "has_hvapi",
    "CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE",
    "SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT",
    "TICKETS_UPDATE_LIMIT",
    "PER_TICKET_UPDATES_LIMIT",
    "INFLIGHT_JOBS_LIMIT",
    "INCREMENTAL_EXPORTS_LIMIT",
    "ERRORS_429_COUNT"
  ],
  header: {
    INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_SUBDOMAIN: "Subdomain",
    INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_POD_ID: "Pod",
    plan_tier: "Plan Tier",
    has_hvapi: "HVAPI?",
    CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE: "Renewal Date",
    SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT: "Global API",
    TICKETS_UPDATE_LIMIT: "Ticket Threshold",
    PER_TICKET_UPDATES_LIMIT: "Per-Ticket",
    INFLIGHT_JOBS_LIMIT: "Bulk Jobs",
    INCREMENTAL_EXPORTS_LIMIT: "Incremental",
    ERRORS_429_COUNT: "429 Errors"
  },
  sort: "SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 50
})

title: Rate Limit Override Audit
text:
MEDIUM Concern Accounts
Accounts at HVAPI standard limits (2500 RPM global or 300 ticket threshold) but without the HVAPI addon. These may be legacy overrides or deals that should have been cleaned up.

Inputs.table(mediumData, {
  columns: [
    "INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_SUBDOMAIN",
    "INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_POD_ID",
    "plan_tier",
    "CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE",
    "SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT",
    "TICKETS_UPDATE_LIMIT",
    "PER_TICKET_UPDATES_LIMIT",
    "INFLIGHT_JOBS_LIMIT",
    "INCREMENTAL_EXPORTS_LIMIT",
    "ERRORS_429_COUNT"
  ],
  header: {
    INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_SUBDOMAIN: "Subdomain",
    INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_POD_ID: "Pod",
    plan_tier: "Plan Tier",
    CONTRACT_RENEWAL_DATE: "Renewal Date",
    SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT: "Global API",
    TICKETS_UPDATE_LIMIT: "Ticket Threshold",
    PER_TICKET_UPDATES_LIMIT: "Per-Ticket",
    INFLIGHT_JOBS_LIMIT: "Bulk Jobs",
    INCREMENTAL_EXPORTS_LIMIT: "Incremental",
    ERRORS_429_COUNT: "429 Errors"
  },
  sort: "SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 50
})

title: Rate Limit Override Audit
text:
Methodology

Thresholds



Category
Default
HVAPI Default
“Elevated” = above




Global API (RPM)
200/400/700
2500
700


Ticket Updates Threshold
20/100
300
100


Per-Ticket Update Rate Limit
30
30
30


Bulk Jobs (Inflight)
30
30
30


Incremental Exports
10/30
30
30





Classification Logic

HIGH: Any limit above HVAPI standard (>2500, >300, or >30 for per-ticket/bulk/incremental)
MEDIUM: At HVAPI level (2500 global OR 300 threshold) without high_volume_api subscription feature
NORMAL: Elevated above base plan default but within their plan entitlement



Data Sources







Source
Description




FACT_CAPACITY_AGGREGATED_API_USAGE_DATA_DAILY_SNAPSHOT
Current effective rate limits per account


BASE_SUBSCRIPTION_FEATURES
Subscription feature flags (HVAPI, plan tier)

title: Rate Limit Override Audit
text:
Sandbox Accounts
Accounts identified as sandboxes via INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_SANDBOX_MASTER_ID. These inherit rate limit overrides from their production parent or have been independently overridden. Separated from the main report since they typically don’t need independent audit.

md`**${sandboxData.length} sandbox accounts** with elevated rate limits (excluded from main tables above).`







Inputs.table(sandboxData, {
  columns: [
    "INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_SUBDOMAIN",
    "concern_level",
    "plan_tier",
    "SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT",
    "TICKETS_UPDATE_LIMIT",
    "PER_TICKET_UPDATES_LIMIT",
    "INFLIGHT_JOBS_LIMIT",
    "INCREMENTAL_EXPORTS_LIMIT"
  ],
  header: {
    INSTANCE_ACCOUNT_SUBDOMAIN: "Subdomain",
    concern_level: "Concern",
    plan_tier: "Plan Tier",
    SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT: "Global API",
    TICKETS_UPDATE_LIMIT: "Ticket Threshold",
    PER_TICKET_UPDATES_LIMIT: "Per-Ticket",
    INFLIGHT_JOBS_LIMIT: "Bulk Jobs",
    INCREMENTAL_EXPORTS_LIMIT: "Incremental"
  },
  sort: "SUBSCRIPTION_RATE_LIMIT",
  reverse: true,
  rows: 30
})
